summary.intent: Implement Checkbox primitive adapters and styled components for Leptos and Dioxus (issues #320 and #431), create PR #727, then address CI failures and Codex review findings.
summary.outcome: PR #727 was created and pushed. A follow-up fix commit addressed the CI wasm compile failure (dioxus_ssr unavailable under web feature), nine Codex review findings, and clippy/formatting issues. Local focused gates all pass; CI rerun and Codex re-review still pending.

repo: dx fmt can silently rewrite RSX syntax in Dioxus examples in ways that break Rust compilation; every amend/push requires re-checking the three widgets-dioxus*/src/categories/input.rs files.
cargo xci --profile fast is the 10-step CI gate (fmt → clippy → ~9,221 unit tests → integration → adapters → spec snippets → mutex → snapshot count → native coverage).

cargo xtask lint adapter-parity checks parity between implemented and documented workflow components; failure scope must be explicitly limited to documented-workflow components or it surfaces unrelated older debt (Button, Tabs, Dismissable).
Codex review is triggered by commenting '@codex review' on the PR; 👀 reaction confirms it is running, 👍 reaction indicates approval.
snapshot-reviewed label must be added before CI runs, or Snapshot Change Check fails on timing regardless of label presence.

The waiting-for-codex-review skill (.agents/skills/waiting-for-codex-review/SKILL.md) is a required workflow: poll for threads, fix each one, reply with fixing commit SHA, resolve the thread, then re-trigger '@codex review'.
wasm coverage builds run with --features web, not --features ssr; dioxus_ssr is unavailable in that build target so tests using it must be cfg-gated or use --no-run as a local compile check.

code.finding: Test used dioxus_ssr for SSR smoke testing, which is not available under the wasm 'web' feature; must be cfg-gated with #[cfg(not(target_arch = 'wasm32'))] or removed from the wasm test target.
StoredValue<Option<FormResetListener>> cannot be cloned; cleanup must use update_value(|v| v.take()) instead of get_value() to move the listener out, matching the existing safe_listener pattern.

Clippy prefers method references over closures, but dx fmt rewrites method references back to closures and can produce malformed duplicate lines; the safe pattern is a small named const helper function instead.
root_class_attrs helper added to merge consumer-provided and adapter root classes before forwarding; exported through ars-dioxus prelude so styled templates only need use ars_dioxus::prelude::*.

adapter_parity lint must distinguish documented_adapter_components (hard failure) from implemented_adapter_components (report-only) to avoid this PR failing on pre-existing Button/Tabs/Dismissable parity gaps.

workflow: Use cargo +nightly test --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --no-run as a wasm compile gate when the sandbox cannot spawn a browser runner.

When a coverage CI job fails with 'lcov.info missing', the root cause is a compile error earlier in that job, not a threshold failure; filter the log with rg for 'error:' rather than reading 14k lines.
ps is sandboxed and unavailable for inspecting hook process trees; if a pre-commit hook hangs, wait rather than inspecting.
After each apply_patch or edit, re-read the exact line range with nl -ba before the next patch to avoid context-shift failures from interleaved parallel reads.
cargo xclippy warnings in changed code should be treated as blocking before push, even if not surfaced by xci fast; this repo enforces a clean clippy gate.

friction: dx fmt silently corrupts Dioxus RSX examples after git amend, requiring a re-verify loop on every push.
Pre-commit hook ran for >2 minutes with no stdout output; ps is sandboxed so process state was unverifiable.
First gh pr create failed with a network restriction; required a second invocation.
apply_patch tool repeatedly missed context due to parallel read output interleaving, requiring many small sequential patches instead of one.
Snapshot Change Check CI failed due to label arriving after the workflow started, not a real snapshot issue.
Codecov coverage CI failure was buried in 14k log lines; required piping through rg to find the actual compile error.
Clippy method-reference suggestions and dx fmt are mutually incompatible; formatter reverts what clippy requires, causing a loop until a named helper function was introduced.
StoredValue clone error only surfaced at wasm compile time, not in native tests, adding a late-stage fix cycle.
open_items: Codex review threads on PR #727 still need per-thread replies with the fix commit SHA and explicit resolution before re-triggering '@codex review'.
Snapshot Change Check CI job needs a manual rerun now that the snapshot-reviewed label is in place.
Existing adapter parity debt for Button, Tabs, Dismissable, and Form components is intentionally deferred and only reported, not failing, in this PR.
Codecov lcov.info upload should be verified as working once CI reruns with the wasm compile fix in place.
